mapper.select: SELECT id, exam_paper_id, seq, q_type, question_text, image_url, score, created_at FROM question WHERE exam_paper_id = #{paperId} ORDER BY seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (exam_paper_id, seq, q_type, question_text, image_url, score) VALUES (#{examPaperId}, #{seq}, #{qType}, #{questionText}, #{imageUrl}, #{score})
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET seq = #{seq}, q_type = #{qType}, question_text = #{questionText}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, score = #{score} WHERE id = #{id}
